products.name: 🎀 Crocheted Pink Lace Bow
products.description: Handmade wool bow in soft pink with a delicate white border, featuring intricate crochet lacework for a charming and elegant touch.

products.name: Hair Clutcher
products.description: Handmade wool hair accessory featuring crocheted sunflowers with yellow petals and brown centers, attached to braided strands for a natural, elegant look.

products.name: Fluffy Cloud Scrunchie (Gagra)
products.description: Handmade wool scrunchie with a soft, plush texture that adds cozy charm and a gentle hold to any hairstyle.

products.name: Bloom Crochet Sunflower
products.description: Handmade crochet sunflower with bright yellow petals, a rich brown center, and green leaves, beautifully wrapped in decorative paper and tied with a festive ribbon.

products.name: Dreamy Wings Crochet Butterfly
products.description: Handmade crochet butterfly ornament in soft pink, white, and blue yarn, with delicate braided strands ending in tiny flower motifs for a whimsical touch.

products.name: Cozy Bunny with Pink Scarf
products.description: Handmade crochet bunny doll in soft white yarn, featuring long ears with pink details, stitched eyes and smile, and a cute pink scarf for added charm.

products.name: Blooming Vines Crochet Planter
products.description: Handmade yarn hanging planter featuring crocheted green vines with white flowers and yellow centers, suspended by sturdy cords for a charming, nature‑inspired décor piece.

products.name: Elegant Red & White Khana Dress Set
products.description: Handmade crochet khana dress with scalloped edges in alternating red and white yarn, adorned with delicate beadwork. Paired with a matching heart-shaped crochet piece, this set showcases fine craftsmanship and festive charm.

products.name: Scarlet Bloom Beaded Bag - Test Updated Twice
products.description: Unique handmade round handbag designed like a vibrant red flower, paired with a striking strap of large white beads for a bold and elegant statement piece.
